chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Revision Application No.S-115 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on office objection (s) 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of M.A No.4798/2024 29.10.2025 Mr.Muhammad Jamil, Advocate for applicant Mr.Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G ********** The report received from the Trial Court is taken on record. Learned counsel for the applicant does not wish to press this Criminal Revision Application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
